requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (Francophone IEC Alignment)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法语区IEC对齐）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法語區IEC對齊）

summary.en: Benin is a Francophone West African country with IEC-aligned electrical standards administered by ANM (Agence Nationale de Métrologie) for conformity and metrology. The applicable connector ecosystem for any EV charging infrastructure in Benin follows IEC 62196: AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler, and DC fast charging where deployed uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. This IEC connector alignment follows the pattern of France, the EU, and Francophone infrastructure projects across West Africa. Given that Benin's four-wheel EV fleet is negligible as of 2026, IEC 62196 connector specification is most relevant to donor-funded, development-bank, or EU-aligned project tenders where international procurement standards are applied — but the direction of alignment is firmly IEC, not GB/T. Any charger deployed on donor-funded or internationally procured infrastructure projects in Benin would be expected to carry IEC 62196 compliance documentation.
summary.zh: 贝宁是西非法语国家，电气标准通过ANM（贝宁国家计量局）执行IEC体系合格评定和计量。贝宁任何电动汽车充电基础设施适用的接口体系遵循IEC 62196：交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充（如部署）使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。这一IEC接口对齐方向与法国、欧盟及西非法语区基础设施项目一致。截至2026年，贝宁四轮电动汽车保有量可忽略不计，IEC 62196接口规范最主要适用于采用国际采购标准的捐助方资助、开发性银行或欧盟对齐项目招标——但对齐方向明确为IEC，而非GB/T。在贝宁捐助方资助或国际采购基础设施项目中部署的任何充电桩，均应提供IEC 62196合规文件。
summary.zht: 貝寧是西非法語國家，電氣標準通過ANM（貝寧國家計量局）執行IEC體系合格評定和計量。貝寧任何電動汽車充電基礎設施適用的接口體系遵循IEC 62196：交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充（如部署）使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。這一IEC接口對齊方向與法國、歐盟及西非法語區基礎設施項目一致。截至2026年，貝寧四輪電動汽車保有量可忽略不計，IEC 62196接口規範最主要適用於採用國際採購標準的捐助方資助、開發性銀行或歐盟對齊項目招標——但對齊方向明確為IEC，而非GB/T。在貝寧捐助方資助或國際採購基礎設施項目中部署的任何充電樁，均應提供IEC 62196合規文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
ANM (Agence Nationale de Métrologie, Benin) — conformity and metrology authority
EU-aligned infrastructure procurement standards (applicable to donor and EU-funded projects)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), contact arrangement, and locking mechanism — making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus communication per GB/T 27930, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. No IEC 62196-compatible electric vehicles are known to have been commercially deployed in significant numbers in Benin as of 2026, meaning demand-side pull for any connector type remains limited; however, the Francophone and IEC regulatory direction is clear.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）、触点排列和锁止机构上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。截至2026年，贝宁尚无已知大规模商业部署的IEC 62196兼容电动汽车，意味着任何接口类型的需求侧拉动仍然有限；但法语区和IEC的监管方向已明确。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）、觸點排列和鎖止機構上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。截至2026年，貝寧尚無已知大規模商業部署的IEC 62196兼容電動汽車，意味著任何接口類型的需求側拉動仍然有限；但法語區和IEC的監管方向已明確。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments in Benin. Hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118), labels, and test reports is required. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for connector-compliant design in any procurement-governed project. Additionally, exporters should assess the practical demand reality: with negligible four-wheel EV penetration in Benin as of 2026, AC Type 2 EVSE for commercial fleets, diplomatic compounds, hotels, or NGO vehicles is a more realistic near-term market than high-power DC fast chargers. E-moto and e-tricycle charging infrastructure is a separate product segment with different connector requirements (typically domestic AC outlets or proprietary swap-station sockets), not covered by IEC 62196.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于贝宁的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（从GB/T 27930改为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签和测试报告进行硬件重新设计。在任何采购管理项目中，转接器均不是接口合规设计的替代方案。此外，出口商应评估实际需求现实：截至2026年，贝宁四轮电动汽车普及率可忽略不计，面向商业车队、外交使馆、酒店或NGO车辆的交流Type 2充电桩比高功率直流快充桩更具近期市场可行性。电摩和电三轮充电基础设施是另一细分产品领域，具有不同的接口要求（通常为民用交流插座或专有换电站接口），不在IEC 62196范围内。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於貝寧的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（從GB/T 27930改為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤和測試報告進行硬體重新設計。在任何採購管理項目中，轉接器均不是接口合規設計的替代方案。此外，出口商應評估實際需求現實：截至2026年，貝寧四輪電動汽車普及率可忽略不計，面向商業車隊、外交使館、酒店或NGO車輛的交流Type 2充電樁比高功率直流快充樁更具近期市場可行性。電摩和電三輪充電基礎設施是另一細分產品領域，具有不同的接口要求（通常為民用交流插座或專有換電站接口），不在IEC 62196範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for IEC-aligned infrastructure projects — Benin's Francophone and ANM regulatory direction follows IEC 62196; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; practical market demand for four-wheel EVSE is currently very limited
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Benin's regulatory alignment follows IEC 62196 (Type 2 AC / CCS2 DC). GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa. Exporters should also assess whether the practical demand justifies DC fast charger investment given Benin's extremely nascent four-wheel EV fleet as of 2026.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。贝宁监管对齐方向遵循IEC 62196（交流Type 2 / 直流CCS2）。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。出口商还应评估，鉴于截至2026年贝宁四轮电动汽车保有量极度初期，实际需求是否足以支撑直流快充桩投资。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。貝寧監管對齊方向遵循IEC 62196（交流Type 2 / 直流CCS2）。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。出口商還應評估，鑒於截至2026年貝寧四輪電動汽車保有量極度初期，實際需求是否足以支撐直流快充樁投資。
